title: KeyRegistry
description: A versioned registry of cryptographic keys for a node, tracking active, revoked, and superseded keys.

registry_version.description: The version number of this key registry, incremented on each update.

node_id.description: The identifier of the node this key registry belongs to.

active_keys.description: Keys currently in active use by this node.

revoked_keys.description: Keys that have been explicitly revoked.

superseded_keys.description: Keys that have been replaced by newer keys.

role.description: The functional role this key serves (e.g., signing, attestation).

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm for this key. Must be ed25519.

fingerprint.description: The cryptographic fingerprint of this key.

status.description: The current status of this key.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this key was created.
